	cfg, err := LoadConfig("config.json")

		log.Fatalf("failed to load config: %v", err)

	mux.HandleFunc("/health", healthHandler)
	mux.HandleFunc("/status", makeStatusHandler(cfg))

	log.Printf("server starting on %s", addr)
